name: ops-hub-connector
description: In a Tech-Shell Ops Hub connector — S1 read-only foundation. Reads repo contents, PRs, checks, statuses, and security events for connected product repos. No write permissions in S1; contents:write is a deliberate later-sprint escalation gated on the fix-author agent existing. No webhooks in S1 (default_events intentionally empty; no webhook consumer is built this sprint). redirect_url is a placeholder: ops-hub has no public OAuth callback endpoint yet — edit before using the manifest POST flow, or ignore it entirely when creating the App manually in the UI.
